name: Adventure Island
description: Adventure Island is a side-scrolling platformer where the player controls a young boy named Master Higgins (or Takahashi Meijin). The objective is to rescue Princess Tina from the clutches of the Evil Witch Doctor. The game world is divided into multiple islands (or areas), each further subdivided into four stages. The fourth stage always ends in a boss fight. The levels are predominantly linear, with some limited vertical exploration. The player must navigate various environmental hazards such as pits, water, cliffs, and environmental enemies like snails, snakes, and spiders. The player character moves from left to right through the level. The player can jump and throw stone axes (or other acquired weapons) at enemies. Scattered throughout the levels are fruits and other food items that the player can collect to maintain their health bar, which constantly depletes over time. Depletion results in the player losing a life. Some hidden items provide temporary invincibility, score bonuses or weapon upgrades. Collisions with enemies or environmental hazards without invincibility also deplete the health bar. Losing all lives results in a game over.
